summary: Deterministic proof that adapter claim_discovery audience and semantic group hints are used before portable defaults when labeling claim review queues.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the adapter-contract claim that the binary uses audience_hints and semantic_groups before portable path defaults is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: The Cautilus Agent or human reviewer corrects every semantic edge case.
Every possible path default is exhaustively covered.
Adapter hints prove claim evidence status by themselves.

notableAssertions: adapter entries override README defaults before discovery
adapter audience_hints label docs/start.md as user and docs/next.md as developer
adapter semantic_groups label the adapter-owned claim as Adapter setup

decision.reason: The focused runtime test builds an adapter with claim_discovery entries, audience_hints, and semantic_groups, then verifies discovery uses those adapter hints for claim audience and semantic group labels before portable defaults.
